announcements.title: Updated Class Venues
announcements.message: Some senior classes from AB1/AB2 are shifted to the Central Block and a few venues updated. Refresh the Timetable to view the latest schedule.

announcements.title: iOS Update Delay
announcements.message: iOS updates are currently delayed. We are working on it and will release them as soon as possible. We appreciate your patience and understanding.

announcements.title: Update Available
announcements.message: Please update to the latest version from the Play Store or App Store
